title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...to burn the skin of my palm.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My flames were strong enough to work against one of the seven warlords...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet he extin- quished it with his bare hand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only let a little chicklet like you live on a whim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Use your saved life however you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only then will I set sail once again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet the nasty stares from the crew don't feel pleasant, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I care! I'm gonna sleep, let my wounds heal, and eat lots of food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm the one who makes that food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Besides, what you're lacking isn't food...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So how about this? I'll lend you a hand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How'd you like to train under me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least until you're strong enough to show pops a fun time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastard. Just how much are you gonna look down on me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you weren't promising, I wouldn't be helping you out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You sure are a lively one, rookie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone threw me out here while I was still sleeping!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: an enemy ship. They were laying waste to one of our islands- you.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
